scripts.format: prettier --write package.json README.md docs/TODO.md docs/hot-path-optimization-notes.md packages/compiler/bin/zeno-codegen.mjs tests/runtime/property.test.ts eslint.config.mjs .prettierrc.json .github/**/*.yml "examples/webgl-instance-streamer/**/*.{ts,css,md,json,html}"
scripts.format:check: prettier --check package.json README.md docs/TODO.md docs/hot-path-optimization-notes.md packages/compiler/bin/zeno-codegen.mjs tests/runtime/property.test.ts eslint.config.mjs .prettierrc.json .github/**/*.yml "examples/webgl-instance-streamer/**/*.{ts,css,md,json,html}"
scripts.check: npm run version:check && npm run package:policy && npm run clean && npm run build && npm test && npm run codegen:basic && npm run codegen:basic:optimized
scripts.pack:check: npm pack --dry-run --workspace @exornea/zeno-types && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @exornea/zeno-schema && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @exornea/zeno-runtime && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @exornea/zeno-compiler
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm run pack:check && npm run consumer:smoke
